provider: HKU Faculty of Arts BA&BEng(AI&DataSc) Syllabuses
note: The official syllabuses apply to students admitted to BA&BEng(AI&DataSc) in 2025-26 and thereafter, so they cover the 2026-27 cohort; the official curriculum page labels the 2025-26 regulations and syllabuses as pending approval. This supplement records 67 unique explicitly coded courses: 7 AI and Humanity core courses, 18 compulsory Professional Core courses, 2 named mathematics substitutes, 26 disciplinary-elective options, and 14 artificial-intelligence-literacy or language-enhancement courses. The 36-credit AIH Humanities Electives pool, 24-credit Common Core pool, 36-credit free-elective pool, unspecified second AILT course, unnamed Practical Chinese course for Computing and Data Science students, CHIN95xx substitute range, non-credit national-education requirements, and additional prerequisite or co-requisite courses are excluded because the syllabus does not publish a closed coded list for them. MATH2101 and MATH2211 are alternatives to MATH2012 and MATH2014 respectively. COMP3323/FITE3010 and COMP3521/SDST3622 are presented as paired alternatives and each pair can contribute only one course. The pending regulations describe an internship as non-credit-bearing, while the syllabuses and the official curriculum structure identify COMP3512 as a 6-credit course included in the 18-credit Capstone Experience & Internship component; this course supplement follows the course-specific syllabus. Courses assigned to a range of years receive no single recommended Year, and no Semester is inferred. Not all courses are offered every semester or annually.
